title: Evil Console-idated
description: A fork of Console-Idated focusing on EVIL qualities
body:
# Evil Console-idated

A fork of Console-idated focusing on user quality of Life and performance

![Screenshots](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/49575478/205426733-9b842298-ea57-4487-9f20-fc8e90ffffda.png)

Evil console-idated uses the Legacy4J mod to replecate Console edition as best it can.
It features many QoL mods that Console-Idated doesnt. Like Blur+, Do a Barrel Roll, Faster Random and more.

It also features some cool addons, like Legacy Mipmaps and Nvidium, both helping performance.
It should outperform Console-Idated while being more accurate to LCE.

# Features
- Legacy4J for LCE accuracy
- Classic Performance mods like Sodium
- Voice Chat support
- Borderless Fullscreeen mode
